differences.title: 1. EXECUTION MODEL
differences.leftDesc: Updates only changed DOM parts. Minimal overhead.
differences.rightDesc: Server-rendered, no hydration needed. Immediate interactivity.

differences.title: 2. STATE MANAGEMENT
differences.leftDesc: Built-in reactivity primitives for efficient state updates.

differences.title: 3. INITIAL LOAD
differences.leftDesc: Lightweight VDOM and compilation reduce initial payload.
differences.rightDesc: HTML renders instantly; JavaScript resumes execution.

differences.title: 4. LEARNING CURVE
differences.leftDesc: Easier for React developers due to similar hooks.

differences.title: 5. COMPILATION
differences.leftDesc: Compiles JSX to efficient fine-grained updates.

differences.title: 6. COMMUNITY SIZE
differences.leftDesc: Active and enthusiastic, but smaller than established.
differences.rightDesc: Newer, rapidly developing, smaller but growing.

differences.title: 7. PERFORMANCE METRICS
differences.leftDesc: Excellent runtime performance due to reactivity.
